title: Healing Revamped
description: Revamps the healing system. Natural (Passive) healing is now much slower, and the primary way to heal is with various bandages and medical supplies!
body: This datapack/mod aims to increase the difficulty of the game by revamping how healing works! Natural (Passive) healing is now much slower, and your primary method of healing with be with new craftable Bandages and other medical supplies!
